title: Cuneiform Tablet #0961: Middle Babylonian Letter
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a letter document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a letter document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Babylonian period. Letter document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records letter matters typical of Middle Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
